title: Bone Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Tsubaki-no-mai-o.gif|thumb|400px|[[Kimimaro]] utilizing his kekkei genkai, Shikotsumyaku, to manipulate his own bone structure.]]

==Summary==
'''Bone Manipulation''' is the ability to manipulate one's own bones or that of others. Users have complete control over the [[Wikipedia:Bone|bones]] of oneself and others, including growing, shaping, manipulating density/weight, using as projectiles/weapons, etc. They can also manipulate bare skeletons or separate bones.

==Users==
* [[Kimimaro]] and [[Kaguya Ōtsutsuki]] ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
* [[Sans]] and [[Papyrus]] ([[Undertale]])
* Marrow ([[Marvel Comics]])
* [[Marquis ]] ([[Parahumans (Verse)|Worm]])
